name: mongodb-cdc-listener
title: MongoDB CDC Listener
description: Native MongoDB change data capture using change streams. Streams document-level insert, update, replace, and delete changes with resume-token durability and no polling.

display.description: Streams real-time document changes from MongoDB using change streams and fires a Flogo flow for each insert, update, replace, or delete

settings.name: connectionURI
settings.description: Full MongoDB connection URI (mongodb:// or mongodb+srv://). Takes precedence over host/port when set.

display.name: Connection URI
display.description: Full MongoDB connection URI (mongodb:// or mongodb+srv://). When set, host/port/credentials below are ignored.

settings.name: host
settings.description: MongoDB host (used when Connection URI is empty)

display.name: Host
display.description: MongoDB host (used when Connection URI is empty)

settings.name: port
settings.description: MongoDB port (used when Connection URI is empty)

display.name: Port
display.description: MongoDB port (used when Connection URI is empty)

settings.name: username
settings.description: Authentication user

display.name: Username
display.description: Authentication user

settings.name: password
settings.description: Authentication password

display.name: Password
display.description: Authentication password

settings.name: authSource
settings.description: Authentication database

display.name: Auth Source
display.description: Authentication database (default admin)

settings.name: authMechanism
settings.description: Authentication mechanism (e.g. SCRAM-SHA-256)

display.name: Auth Mechanism
display.description: Optional authentication mechanism (e.g. SCRAM-SHA-1, SCRAM-SHA-256)

settings.name: replicaSet
settings.description: Replica set name (change streams require a replica set or sharded cluster)

display.name: Replica Set
display.description: Replica set name. Change streams require a replica set or sharded cluster.

settings.name: tlsConfig
settings.description: Enable TLS/SSL for the MongoDB connection

display.name: Enable TLS Configuration
display.description: Enable TLS/SSL secure connection. When enabled, configure certificates below.

settings.name: tlsCAFile
settings.description: CA certificate file path

display.name: TLS CA Certificate
display.description: CA certificate file path

settings.name: tlsCertificateKeyFile
settings.description: Client certificate + private key file path (PEM)

display.name: TLS Client Certificate Key File
display.description: Combined client certificate and private key file path (PEM) for mutual TLS

settings.name: tlsInsecure
settings.description: Skip certificate and hostname verification (not recommended for production)

display.name: TLS Insecure
display.description: Skip certificate and hostname verification (not recommended for production)

settings.name: connectionTimeout
settings.description: Connection timeout in seconds

display.name: Connection Timeout (s)
display.description: Connection timeout in seconds

settings.name: maxRetryAttempts
settings.description: Maximum reconnect attempts after a stream failure (0 = retry forever)

display.name: Max Retry Attempts
display.description: Maximum reconnect attempts after a stream failure (0 = retry forever)

settings.name: retryDelay
settings.description: Delay between reconnect attempts (Go duration, e.g. 5s)

display.name: Retry Delay
display.description: Delay between reconnect attempts (Go duration, e.g. 5s)

settings.name: database
settings.description: Database to watch (empty = whole deployment)

display.name: Database
display.description: Database to watch. Leave empty to watch the entire deployment.

settings.name: collection
settings.description: Collection to watch (empty = whole database)

display.name: Collection
display.description: Collection to watch. Leave empty to watch the entire database (requires Database).

settings.name: operationTypes
settings.description: Comma-separated operation types: ALL, or any of INSERT, UPDATE, REPLACE, DELETE

display.name: Operation Types
display.description: Comma-separated operation types: ALL, or any of INSERT, UPDATE, REPLACE, DELETE

settings.name: fullDocument
settings.description: Controls the full document returned on updates

display.name: Full Document
display.description: updateLookup returns the current full document on updates. default returns only the delta.

settings.name: fullDocumentBeforeChange
settings.description: Returns the pre-image (previous document). Requires changeStreamPreAndPostImages on the collection (MongoDB 6.0+).

display.name: Full Document Before Change
display.description: Returns the document pre-image in oldData. Requires changeStreamPreAndPostImages enabled on the collection (MongoDB 6.0+).

settings.name: batchSize
settings.description: Change stream cursor batch size (0 = server default)

display.name: Batch Size
display.description: Change stream cursor batch size (0 = server default)

settings.name: maxAwaitTime
settings.description: Maximum time the server waits for new changes before returning (Go duration, e.g. 1s)

display.name: Max Await Time
display.description: Maximum time the server waits for new changes before returning (Go duration, e.g. 1s)

output.name: eventType
output.description: Type of change: INSERT, UPDATE, REPLACE, DELETE, DROP, RENAME, INVALIDATE

output.name: data
output.description: Full document (INSERT/REPLACE; UPDATE when fullDocument lookup is enabled)

output.name: resumeToken
output.description: Resume token for restarting the change stream
